1:
Violation of Server Rule #1 - Respect others.
All discussions must follow basic etiquette. Any behaviour intended to provoke, harass, divide the community, spread misinformation, incite drama, or target others is not tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, threatening, baiting, obscene, defamatory, condescending, or otherwise racially, religiously, politically, or sexually objectionable content, as well as spam, unsolicited messages, or the sharing of personal information. Violations may result in immediate and permanent disciplinary action.
2:
Violation of Server Rule #2 - Explicit content is strictly prohibited, including but not limited to NSFW or disturbing material.
This includes any pornographic, gory, violent, self-harm, sexually suggestive, shocking, or otherwise inappropriate content. Such content is not permitted in any form, including text, images, audio, links, usernames, nicknames, profiles, or attempts to conceal it using spoilers or other methods. There is zero tolerance for any content that sexualizes minors or minor-like characters.
3:
Violation of Server Rule #3 - All forms of advertising/self-promotion are prohibited.
Any advertising efforts (social media accounts, products or services, Discord server invite links, etc.) are not permitted without the explicit permission of the moderation staff. This also includes advertising efforts via DMs. Should you wish to promote your own Discord server in ⁠<#956086639791317022>, please contact <@955443375530704936>
4:
Violation of Server Rule #4 - Discuss in the corresponding language for each section.
We welcome, value, and respect users from all over the world, as well as their languages and cultures. Please only use the corresponding language in each section of the server. You may find your language in the <id:customize> of the onboarding section of the server. When there is no specified language for a channel, it is to be assumed that the only permitted language is English.
5:
Violation of Server Rule #5 - Please read the rules that are specific to each channel.
Different channels have their own set of rules and regulations that are listed on their pins. It is essential to familiarise oneself with the guidelines before engaging in any of these channels. The channel-specific rules have the same weight as the global server rules. When channel-specific rules conflict with global rules, channel-specific rules take precedence.
6:
Violation of Server Rule #6 - Respect intellectual property.
When sharing media, please credit the original creator whenever possible. Providing a source link is required when posting artwork in designated art channels (e.g. <#1176006795874021427>). If a creator does not wish for their work to be shared, or if their account is private, do not repost their content. Posting AI-generated images as well as presenting them as original artwork is strictly prohibited anywhere on the server.
7:
Violation of Server Rule #7 - Post gacha results in the appropriate channels.
Gacha-related content, including screenshots of obtained operators or equipment, must be posted only in the designated gacha channel (e.g. <#1461539565499187251>). Out-of-context or misleading screenshots, such as operator info screens, potential screens, roll history, mid-animation pulls, or cropped result screens, are not permitted elsewhere. Text-based gacha results are allowed, provided they are not used to provoke, boast excessively, or antagonise other users.
8:
Violation of Server Rule #8 - Use feedback channels responsibly.
Before submitting feedback or suggestions, please check whether the topic has already been raised by other users. Use feedback channels for constructive input only, and avoid turning them into general discussion or chat channels.
9:
Violation of Server Rule #9 - Don't ping, mention, or DM any of the Gryphline Staff Role members inadvertently or unnecessarily.
Pinging Gryphline Staff for no reason or while they are not present is considered spam, and if it continues, harassment.
10:
Violation of Server Rule #10 - Avoid discussing illicit topics.
All discussions must comply with Discord’s Terms of Service and the Arknights / Arknights: Endfield Terms of Service. Prohibited content includes, but is not limited to, hacks, cheats, piracy, third-party tools or macros, real-money trading, account sharing or selling, NDA or leaked content, and any media depicting such activities. Datamined content is permitted only if it originates from publicly available game files and must be properly spoiler-tagged. Instructions on obtaining datamined or restricted content are not allowed. Violations of this rule will result in a permanent ban and apply to all games discussed on the server.
11:
Violation of Server Rule #11 - When you have any server-related queries or would want to report any users that are violating the rules, kindly use the appropriate tools.
server-related inquiries or rule violations, please use the appropriate moderation tools. Do not engage, escalate, or take matters into your own hands when encountering provocation, insults, or disruptive behaviour. If you believe a rule has been violated, use the Report function (hold/right-click the message → Apps → Flag for Moderator Review). If additional context is required, you may contact @Endfield Modmail with relevant screenshots. Abuse of the report system or false reports will be punished. Please be patient while the moderation team reviews and investigates each case.
12:
Violation of Server Rule #12 -  If a moderator asks you to do something reasonable in accordance with the rules, please comply accordingly.
se follow reasonable moderator instructions and do not share private warnings issued by the Perlica Bot. If you believe a moderation action was taken in error, you may contact <@955443375530704936> to appeal or provide feedback through the designated channels. Bypassing AutoMod, impersonating staff, attempting to exploit loopholes, or deliberately testing moderation boundaries is prohibited and may result in disciplinary action.

Other:
